name: Aetherium Acquisition Corp. Class A Common Stock
summary: Aetherium Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company focuses on target businesses in the new media, digital health, fintech, e-commerce and technology industries. Aetherium Acquisition Corp. is headquartered in Westport, Connecticut.
